name: assemblyai
description: AssemblyAI speech-to-text and audio intelligence: transcription, speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, entity detection, topic classification, PII redaction, content safety, subtitles

ports.name: assemblyai
ports.description: AssemblyAI speech-to-text and audio intelligence API

capabilities.name: upload
capabilities.purpose: Upload a local audio file via URL and receive a temporary AssemblyAI-hosted URL

capabilities.name: transcribe
capabilities.purpose: Submit audio for transcription with optional audio intelligence features (speaker labels, sentiment, entities, topics, PII redaction, chapters, highlights, content safety)

capabilities.name: get_transcript
capabilities.purpose: Poll transcript status and retrieve results including all audio intelligence outputs

schema.description: Full transcript object with status, text, confidence, and audio intelligence results

capabilities.name: get_sentences
capabilities.purpose: Retrieve transcript segmented by sentences with timing data

capabilities.name: get_paragraphs
capabilities.purpose: Retrieve transcript segmented by paragraphs with timing data

capabilities.name: get_subtitles
capabilities.purpose: Export transcript as SRT or VTT subtitle format

capabilities.name: word_search
capabilities.purpose: Search transcript for specific words and get timestamps

schema.description: Word search matches with timestamps and counts

capabilities.name: list_transcripts
capabilities.purpose: List recent transcripts with optional status and pagination filters

capabilities.name: delete_transcript
capabilities.purpose: Permanently remove a transcript and its associated data

capabilities.name: get_redacted_audio
capabilities.purpose: Retrieve PII-redacted audio URL for a transcript with redact_pii_audio enabled

skills.name: Upload Audio
skills.description: Upload audio via URL to AssemblyAI and receive a temporary hosted URL for transcription

expected_effects.description: temporary audio file hosted on AssemblyAI

skills.name: Transcribe Audio
skills.description: Submit audio for transcription with optional audio intelligence features (speaker labels, sentiment, entities, topics, PII redaction, chapters, highlights, content safety)

skills.name: Get Transcript
skills.description: Poll transcript status and retrieve results including all audio intelligence outputs

schema.description: Full transcript object with status, text, confidence, and audio intelligence results

skills.name: Get Sentences
skills.description: Retrieve transcript segmented by sentences with timing data

skills.name: Get Paragraphs
skills.description: Retrieve transcript segmented by paragraphs with timing data

skills.name: Get Subtitles
skills.description: Export transcript as SRT or VTT subtitle format

skills.name: Word Search
skills.description: Search transcript for specific words and get timestamps

schema.description: Word search matches with timestamps and counts

skills.name: List Transcripts
skills.description: List recent transcripts with optional status and pagination filters

skills.name: Delete Transcript
skills.description: Permanently remove a transcript and its associated data

skills.name: Get Redacted Audio
skills.description: Retrieve PII-redacted audio URL for a transcript with redact_pii_audio enabled
